message:
feat(tui): enrich board detail, tree mode, and actionable mode

Board detail pane:
- Added labels display (up to 4 with +N overflow)
- Added issue age and last-updated relative dates
- Added graph metrics (PageRank, critical depth, articulation point)
- Multi-line description with box-drawing separator

Tree mode:
- Added priority badge (P0-P4) per node
- Added blocker/unblocks indicators (⊘N/↓N)
- Added cycle membership marker (⟳)
- Uses status_icon() instead of simple o/x

Actionable mode:
- Track items now show priority badge
- Unblocks shows actual issue IDs (up to 2 + overflow count)
  instead of just a count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
